privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a 3D model from scratch without any pre-existing dataset. The expected paths for the SLVS and STL files, as well as the target outer diameter of 40.0mm and extrusion thickness of 25.0mm, exactly match the constraints verified in verifier.py. Mathematical calculation confirms that a keyed shaft hub with these parameters results in an expected total volume of ~26693 mm³, correctly falling within the specified 26000 to 27400 mm³ verification bounds.
